other_observers: Dave Leatherman and Dotti Russell observed the Cape May briefly on the 26th; original finder and identifier
duration: on and off for about 3 hours
specific_location: -5 miles south of the south edge of Lamar on Hwy 287 and about half mile to the west -in the back yard of the farm house
description: -colorful warbler -dark olive crown and back with darker streaking on back -yellow neck, throat and face with rusty or rufous colored auriculars and above eye -light lower belly -black streaks converge at throat -white greater covertsBehaviors: -fed warbler like in the pinion pines -secretive -disappeared several timesCall: n/aPlumage: adult male
photographer: Photographer: Jane Stulp, Jane Stulp, Jane Stulp, Jane Stulp
